case_for: Cousins has cleared 12.0 points in half his recent outings (wk2, wk3 close, and both wk7/wk8 well above), showing he can produce when the matchup allows it.
case_against: The pregame consensus projection of just 7.5 points—well below the 12.0 threshold—reflects analyst expectation of a difficult matchup or ongoing struggles, consistent with his recent low finishes in wk1 (6.2) and wk4 (7.5).
